homepage.heroSubline: Transforming outdoor spaces across Central Ohio. Expert hardscaping solutions built to last.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Outdoor Living Spaces in Columbus
aboutText: Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Columbus homeowners with exceptional hardscaping services. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of the Ohio climate and could deliver lasting results.

Our approach is built on meticulous planning, skilled craftsmanship, and open communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your outdoor space looks beautiful for years to come. We take the time to understand your vision and bring it to life with precision and care.

We're proud to be a local business, committed to serving our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create outdoor spaces that enhance the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Experienced Craftsmen
valueProps.description: Years of experience tackling Columbus's unique climate and soil conditions.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We source durable, weather-resistant materials built to withstand Ohio winters.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: Tailored hardscaping solutions that match your home's style and your personal taste.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with a commitment to your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

services.name: Patio Installation
services.shortDescription: Custom-designed patios that enhance your outdoor living space.
services.description: We specialize in designing and installing patios that perfectly complement your Columbus home. From classic brick patios that evoke the charm of German Village to modern paver patios that create a sleek, contemporary look, we can bring your vision to life. We consider the unique challenges of Columbus's climate, selecting materials that can withstand freeze-thaw cycles and prevent cracking. Our patio installation process includes careful site preparation, proper drainage to prevent water damage, and expert craftsmanship to ensure a level and durable surface. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design to final cleanup, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. We can also incorporate features such as fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and seating areas to create a truly functional and inviting outdoor space. Whether you're looking for a small, intimate patio or a large entertainment area, we have the expertise and experience to deliver exceptional results. We work with a variety of materials, including pavers, brick, natural stone, and concrete, and we can help you choose the best option for your budget and style. Our patios are built to last, adding value and enjoyment to your home for years to come.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to determine your needs and preferences.
Step 2: Site preparation, including excavation and grading.
Step 3: Installation of base materials for proper drainage and stability.
Step 4: Paver or stone installation with precise cuts and alignment.

faq.question: What type of base is used under a paver patio?
faq.answer: We use a compacted gravel base, typically 4-6 inches thick, to provide a stable and well-draining foundation for your patio.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a patio?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be completed within 1-2 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a patio installation?
faq.answer: Depending on the size and location of your patio, a permit may be required. We can assist you with the permit application process.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.shortDescription: Functional and beautiful retaining walls to stabilize your landscape.
services.description: Retaining walls are essential for managing slopes and preventing erosion in Columbus's varied terrain. We design and build retaining walls that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing, using materials that complement your home's style. Our retaining walls are engineered to withstand the pressure of the soil and prevent water damage, ensuring long-term stability. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and site preparation to final construction and landscaping. We work with a variety of materials, including concrete blocks, natural stone, and timber, and we can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget. Whether you need a retaining wall to prevent soil erosion, create a level patio area, or add visual interest to your landscape, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We understand the importance of proper drainage and soil compaction, and we take meticulous care to ensure that your retaining wall is built to last. Our goal is to provide you with a retaining wall that not only solves your landscaping challenges but also enhances the beauty and value of your property. We are familiar with Columbus's building codes and regulations, ensuring that your retaining wall is built in compliance with all applicable standards.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and soil analysis.
Step 2: Design and engineering of the retaining wall.
Step 3: Excavation and foundation preparation.
Step 4: Wall construction with proper drainage and backfilling.

faq.question: What type of drainage is required behind a retaining wall?
faq.answer: We typically install a perforated drain pipe behind the wall, surrounded by gravel, to collect and redirect water away from the soil.

faq.question: How tall can a retaining wall be without a permit?
faq.answer: The height limit for retaining walls without a permit varies by municipality in Columbus. We can advise you on the specific requirements for your property.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of a properly built retaining wall?
faq.answer: A properly built retaining wall can last for 50 years or more with minimal maintenance.

services.name: Driveway Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Durable and attractive driveways that enhance your curb appeal.
services.description: Your driveway is one of the first things people see when they arrive at your home. We offer driveway installation and repair services that will enhance your curb appeal and provide a durable, long-lasting surface. We understand the importance of proper drainage and base preparation to prevent cracking and settling, especially with Columbus's freeze-thaw cycles. We offer a variety of materials, including concrete, asphalt, and pavers, and we can help you choose the best option for your budget and style. Whether you need a new driveway installed or your existing driveway repaired, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. Our driveway installation process includes careful site preparation, proper compaction, and expert paving to ensure a smooth and level surface. We also offer driveway sealing services to protect your driveway from the elements and extend its lifespan. Our repair services include crack filling, patching, and resurfacing. We are committed to providing you with a driveway that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, adding value and curb appeal to your home. We comply with all Columbus building codes and regulations, ensuring that your driveway is built to the highest standards.
process: Step 1: Excavation and removal of existing driveway (if applicable).
Step 2: Installation of a compacted gravel base.
Step 3: Pouring and leveling of concrete or asphalt.
Step 4: Sealing and finishing to protect the surface.

faq.question: How long does it take for a new concrete driveway to cure?
faq.answer: A new concrete driveway typically takes 7-10 days to fully cure before it can be driven on.

faq.question: How often should I seal my asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: Asphalt driveways should be sealed every 2-3 years to protect them from the elements and prevent cracking.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent cracks in my driveway?
faq.answer: Proper drainage, a solid base, and regular sealing are the best ways to prevent cracks in your driveway.

services.name: Walkway Installation
services.shortDescription: Safe and stylish walkways that guide you through your landscape.
services.description: Enhance the beauty and functionality of your property with custom-designed walkways. We specialize in walkway installation using a variety of materials, including pavers, brick, natural stone, and concrete. We consider the architectural style of your home and the surrounding landscape to create walkways that are both aesthetically pleasing and safe to navigate. Our walkway installation process includes careful site preparation, proper drainage to prevent water damage, and expert craftsmanship to ensure a level and durable surface. We can also incorporate lighting to enhance safety and create a welcoming ambiance. Whether you need a walkway to connect your driveway to your front door, a path through your garden, or a patio connector, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We are familiar with Columbus's building codes and regulations, ensuring that your walkway is built in compliance with all applicable standards. We are committed to providing you with walkways that are both beautiful and functional, adding value and enjoyment to your home for years to come. We understand the importance of proper grading and slope to ensure that water drains away from your home's foundation, preventing water damage.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to determine the best layout and materials.
Step 2: Site preparation, including excavation and grading.
Step 3: Installation of base materials for proper drainage.
Step 4: Paver or stone installation with precise alignment.

faq.question: What is the best material for a walkway in Columbus?
faq.answer: Pavers and natural stone are popular choices for walkways in Columbus due to their durability and aesthetic appeal.

faq.question: How wide should a walkway be?
faq.answer: A walkway should be at least 3 feet wide to allow two people to walk comfortably side by side.

faq.question: Do I need to seal my paver walkway?
faq.answer: Sealing your paver walkway can help protect it from stains and fading and extend its lifespan.

services.name: Outdoor Kitchens
services.shortDescription: Custom outdoor kitchens for ultimate entertaining.
services.description: Take your outdoor entertaining to the next level with a custom-designed outdoor kitchen. We specialize in designing and building outdoor kitchens that are both functional and stylish, creating a space where you can cook, dine, and relax with family and friends. We work with you to create a design that fits your needs and budget, incorporating features such as grills, cooktops, refrigerators, sinks, and storage cabinets. Our outdoor kitchens are built with durable, weather-resistant materials that can withstand the elements, ensuring long-term performance. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and site preparation to final installation and finishing. We are familiar with Columbus's building codes and regulations, ensuring that your outdoor kitchen is built in compliance with all applicable standards. We are committed to providing you with an outdoor kitchen that is both beautiful and functional, adding value and enjoyment to your home for years to come. Whether you're looking for a simple grill station or a fully equipped outdoor kitchen, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We understand the importance of proper ventilation and electrical wiring, and we take meticulous care to ensure that your outdoor kitchen is safe and functional.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to determine your needs and preferences.
Step 2: Site preparation, including excavation and utility connections.
Step 3: Construction of the kitchen frame and countertops.
Step 4: Installation of appliances and finishing touches.

faq.question: What type of countertop is best for an outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: Granite and concrete are popular choices for outdoor kitchen countertops due to their durability and weather resistance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: A permit may be required for an outdoor kitchen, depending on the size and features of the kitchen. We can assist you with the permit application process.

faq.question: How do I protect my outdoor kitchen during the winter?
faq.answer: We recommend covering your outdoor kitchen with a waterproof tarp or cover during the winter to protect it from the elements.

services.name: Fire Pit Installation
services.shortDescription: Cozy fire pits for year-round enjoyment.
services.description: Extend your outdoor season with a custom-built fire pit. We design and install fire pits that create a warm and inviting atmosphere in your backyard. Our fire pits are built with durable, weather-resistant materials that can withstand the elements, ensuring long-term performance. We offer a variety of styles, including wood-burning, gas-burning, and propane-burning fire pits, and we can help you choose the best option for your needs and preferences. Our fire pit installation process includes careful site preparation, proper ventilation, and expert craftsmanship to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience. We can also incorporate seating areas and landscaping to create a complete outdoor living space. Whether you're looking for a simple fire pit for roasting marshmallows or a grand fire pit for entertaining guests, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We are familiar with Columbus's building codes and regulations, ensuring that your fire pit is built in compliance with all applicable standards. We are committed to providing you with a fire pit that is both beautiful and functional, adding warmth and ambiance to your outdoor space for years to come. We understand the importance of proper safety precautions, and we take meticulous care to ensure that your fire pit is built to the highest safety standards.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to determine the best location and style.
Step 2: Site preparation, including excavation and leveling.
Step 3: Construction of the fire pit using durable materials.
Step 4: Installation of gas lines or propane tanks (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the best material for a fire pit?
faq.answer: Natural stone and concrete blocks are popular choices for fire pits due to their durability and heat resistance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a fire pit?
faq.answer: A permit may be required for a fire pit, depending on the size and location of the fire pit. We can assist you with the permit application process.

faq.question: What safety precautions should I take when using a fire pit?
faq.answer: Always keep a fire extinguisher or water hose nearby, never leave a fire unattended, and keep children and pets at a safe distance.

serviceAreas.content:
Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC is proud to offer our expert hardscaping services to the residents of Dublin, Ohio. Known for its upscale subdivisions and beautiful homes built primarily in the 1980s through 2000s, Dublin boasts stunning landscapes that deserve the very best in hardscape design and installation. We understand the importance of maintaining and enhancing the curb appeal of your Dublin property. 

Our team specializes in creating custom patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor living spaces that complement the architectural style of Dublin homes. We use only the highest quality materials to ensure that your hardscaping project will withstand the test of time, even with the harsh Ohio winters and freeze-thaw cycles that can cause damage. Let Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC transform your Dublin backyard into an oasis you'll enjoy for years to come.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dublin, Ohio, is characterized by its upscale residential areas and a strong emphasis on community aesthetics, making quality hardscaping a vital aspect of home improvement.

serviceAreas.content:
Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC provides professional hardscaping services to homeowners in Westerville, Ohio. Westerville, with its established suburbs dating back to the 1970s and 80s, features many mature landscapes that can benefit from updated or enhanced hardscaping elements. We understand the unique challenges of working with older properties and can provide solutions that blend seamlessly with the existing landscape.

From repairing existing patios and walkways to designing and installing new outdoor living spaces, our team has the expertise to handle any hardscaping project in Westerville. We take into account the cold, snowy winters and freeze-thaw damage common in Ohio, ensuring that our installations are durable and long-lasting. Trust Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC to enhance your Westerville home with beautiful and functional hardscaping.
serviceAreas.localContext: Westerville, Ohio, known for its mature neighborhoods and tree-lined streets, benefits from thoughtful hardscaping that complements its established landscape.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care did an amazing job on our new patio! They helped us design a space that perfectly fits our needs and the quality of the work is outstanding. The crew was professional, courteous, and cleaned up everything meticulously. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care to build a retaining wall in our backyard to address some serious erosion issues. They did a great job and the wall looks fantastic. There was a minor delay due to weather, but they communicated well and kept us informed throughout the process.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Our driveway was cracked and crumbling after years of Columbus winters. Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care came out and did a fantastic job patching and sealing it. It looks almost new! Great service and fair pricing.

reviews.name: John L.
reviews.text: We needed a walkway installed from our driveway to the front porch and Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care provided a fantastic design and installation. The crew was very professional and efficient. We are thrilled with the results.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care built our dream outdoor kitchen! From the initial design to the final installation, they were a pleasure to work with. The quality of the materials and workmanship is exceptional. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Mike S.
reviews.text: We had Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care install a gas fire pit in our backyard. They did a great job and we've been enjoying it ever since! There was a slight issue with the gas line connection, but they quickly resolved it. Overall, we are very satisfied.
